owns: Reusable graph kernels and connectivity metrics.
Generic statistical or optimization primitives with no civic-time semantics.
must_not_own: Time-zone legal authority or solar-time policy assumptions.
ZONES source caveats, scenario labels, or civil-time scoring definitions.

owns: Portable legal-boundary unit graph and context contracts.
Unit ids, adjacency, populations, source hashes, and assignment carriers.
must_not_own: Solar-noon error scoring or DST scenario semantics.

owns: Civil-time regimes, offset rules, DST deltas, and scenario labels.
Solar-time scoring, source limitation matrices, and time-zone research artifacts.
Mappings from RPLAN contexts into time-zone plan evaluations.
must_not_own: Generic graph-kernel implementations that belong in RLINE.
Reusable non-time-zone redistricting context semantics that belong in RPLAN.

owns: Election/redistricting application precedent and Census/GEOID implementation examples.
must_not_own: Shared boundary contracts that should be promoted into RPLAN.

caveats: This contract is architectural guidance; it does not prevent future extraction of reusable ZONES components into shared crates.
